description: Unveil your professional potential with a modern and clean CV design. This curriculum vitae template is a perfect blend of simplicity and modernity, making it an excellent choice for those seeking a light yet professionally polished look. The layout ensures a clear presentation of your career history and skills, making it easy for recruiters to navigate. It's a perfect choice for anyone looking to showcase their professionalism in a simple and modern format. This template is part of our range of CV & Resumes templates, designed to help you make a strong impression and land your dream job.
short_description: Discover a blend of simplicity and modernity with this clean, light CV template. Perfect for showcasing professionalism and skills in a clear, easy-to-navigate format. Ideal for CV & Resumes, helping you make a strong impression and land your dream job.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.

html_data:
Mark Sanders

Senior Account Manager

 

About Me

 

I have over 15 years experience of building relationships with buyers in government, large multinational businesses and charities, growing revenue and creating new initiatives to further enhance revenue opportunities. I am a self-starter, strong communicator and expert negotiator looking to bring my skills and knowledge to an ambitious business.

 

Contact

 
  • 0874 254 658
  • 42 Street, City, Country
  • example@example.com
 

Experience

 
 

2016 - Present

Account Manager - Consult Berlin

Top 5 global management consultancy with £30b annual revenue. Managed 5 key accounts for the business tax advice department. Tasked with growing accounts and building relationships

2016 - 2013

Sales Manager - ITHD London 

Large Systems Integrator with major government customers. Selling and upselling solutions to leading accounts. 

 

Education

 
 

2013

MSc Management Studies

University of London

2009

BSc Busines Studies

University of Liverpool

 

Skills

 
  • Confident self-starter with proven relationship building skills
  • Operates well under pressure
  • Knowledge of the finance sector and how to build relationships right along the value chain
  • Technical skills and comfortable using all popular CRMs including Salesforce
 

Additional skills and proficiencies

 
  • Key Account Management qualification from CIM: 2005
  • MEMBERSHIPS: Member of the Strategic Account Management Association (SAMA) since 2001
  • German Language: fluent
  • French Language: Intermediate

style.font-family: Open Sans, Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
